commands.review_summary:
The branch filters Mistral function tools whose schema conversion throws, omits empty Mistral tool arrays, and rejects pinned toolChoice values that target skipped tools with focused provider tests.

PR surface: Source +26, Tests +96. Total +122 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main reads tool.parameters directly in toFunctionTools during buildChatPayload, so a throwing parameters getter aborts before Mistral chat.stream. The PR adds mocked regression cases for that path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer handling of a draft/protected-label PR and validation coordination, not an automated repair task.

target.title: fix(providers): skip unreadable Mistral tool schemas
target.body:
## Summary

- skip only unreadable Mistral tool schemas while preserving healthy sibling tools
- omit empty Mistral tool payloads after schema filtering
- fail locally when a forced Mistral `toolChoice` references a tool that was skipped during conversion

## Verification

- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=/tmp/openclaw-vitest-next189-red nodenv exec node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/llm/providers/mistral.test.ts --testNamePattern="unreadable tool schemas" --reporter=verbose` failed before the fix because no Mistral payload was sent
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=/tmp/openclaw-vitest-next189-rebase3 nodenv exec node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/llm/providers/mistral.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `nodenv exec node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/llm/providers/mistral.ts src/llm/providers/mistral.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: an unreadable plugin/extension tool schema can no longer crash Mistral request payload construction before healthy sibling tools are sent.

Real environment tested: local focused Mistral provider Vitest shard in the linked gwt worktree, plus oxlint, diff-check, and branch autoreview.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: reproduced the pre-fix crash with the new unreadable-schema regression, rebased on current `origin/main`, then ran the full affected Mistral provider test file, oxlint, `git diff --check`, and branch autoreview.

Evidence after fix: `src/llm/providers/mistral.test.ts` passed 3/3 after the final rebase; branch autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings and `overall: patch is correct (0.86)`.

Observed result after fix: unreadable Mistral tool schemas are skipped per tool, healthy siblings remain in the Mistral payload, empty tool lists are omitted, and pinned choices for skipped tools fail locally instead of silently downgrading.

What was not tested: broad `pnpm check:changed` was not run because Blacksmith Testbox is not authenticated in this environment and AWS Crabbox coordinator calls returned 401 on run history and lease creation.
target.author: vincentkoc
